tasks.subject: Make `/extensions update` selective ‚Äî only update outdated packages
tasks.description:
Change `updatePackagesInternal` to iterate only over packages flagged by `checkForAvailableUpdates()` and call `update(source)` for each, instead of `update(undefined)` which touches everything.

Add `--all` / `--force` flag that triggers the old behavior (force-update all regardless).

Update registry command parsing, help text, and the `BULK_UPDATE_LABEL` logging accordingly.
